memoryArtifacts.headline: St Mary in the Marsh Church
St Mary in the Marsh
memoryArtifacts.description:
St Mary in the Marsh is located in the heart of Romney Marsh in south east Kent in one of its least populated areas.

The seaside village of St Mary's Bay is about 2 miles to its east and the town of New Romney is about 3 miles to its south east. [see maps]

It is probable that there was a Saxon church on the site originally known as "Siwold's Circe". This was superseded after the Norman invasion by a stone built church with a splendid three tier tower of Kentish ragstone. The oldest parts of the church are about 1133 AD.

St Mary in the Marsh is surrounded by the stark beauty of the marshes and the open landscapes of rich farmland

Author of the famous childrens' book The Railway Children Edith Nesbit, born in 1858, is buried in the churchyard of St Mary in the Marsh. more

John Coleman, born in St Mary in the Marsh in 1798,  won the Victoria Cross (VC) at the siege of Sebastopol in the Crimean war. more http://www.stmarysbay.net/stmaryinthemarsh/

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Knight Alexander Alured De Denne於1185年出生在英國英格蘭肯特金斯頓時，他的父親William de Dene28歲，母親Sybell de Gatton23歲。他和Arlene West至少有4個兒子。他去世於1256年在他的家鄉享年71歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Denne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (mainly northern) and Walloon: probably a variant of Dhenne, a patronymic, with fused preposition d(e) ‘of’, from Henne, a pet form of the personal names French Henri, Flemish Hendrik (see Henry 1). Alternatively, perhaps a variant of Daine, the feminine form of Dain .

variants.name: Denn
meanings: English (Kent): variant of Denne , a habitational name from one or more of the numerous places in Kent and Sussex with names derived from Middle English den ‘woodland swine-pasture’ (Old English denn), such as Denne Manor in Chilham, Denne Hill in Kingston, and Denne Court in Woodnesborough (Kent); Denne Park in Horsham, Denne in Warnham, and Dann's Farm in Willingdon (Sussex).
English: possibly from a pet form of   Denis  .

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

nameMeanings.name: Alured
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English name derived from ælf ‘elf, supernatural being’ + ræd ‘counsel’. It was a relatively common name before the Norman Conquest of Britain, being borne most notably by Alfred the Great ( 849–899 ), King of Wessex. After the Conquest it was adopted by the Normans in a variety of more or less radically altered forms ( see Avery ). In some regions the forms Alvery and Avery never fell entirely out of favour and became locally popular in the 16th century. It provides a rare example ( Edward is another) of a distinctively Old English name that has spread widely on the Continent. It was strongly revived in the 19th century, along with other names of pre-Conquest historical figures, faded in the mid-20th century, but has since recovered some popularity.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Knight Alexander Alured De Denne was born in 1185, in Kingston, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Dene, was 28 and his mother, Sybell de Gatton, was 23. He had at least 4 sons with Arlene West. He died in 1256, in his hometown, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Knight Alexander Alured De Denne est né en 1185, à Kingston, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Dene, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Sybell de Gatton, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Arlene West. Il est décédé en 1256, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Knight Alexander Alured De Denne 1185 in Kingston, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Dene 28 und seine Mutter Sybell de Gatton 23. Er hatte mit Arlene West mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1256 im Alter von 71 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Knight Alexander Alured De Denne è nato il nel 1185 nel Kingston, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Dene, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Sybell de Gatton, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Arlene West. Morì nel 1256, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Knight Alexander Alured De Denneが1185年にイギリスイギリスケントキングストンで生まれた時，父William de Deneは28歳，母Sybell de Gattonは23歳であった。彼はArlene Westとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は1256年に故郷で71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Knight Alexander Alured De Denne(이)가 1185년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 킨그스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Dene(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybell de Gatton(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Arlene West(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1256년 그의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Knight Alexander Alured De Denne nasceu em 1185, em Kingston, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Dene, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Sybell de Gatton, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Arlene West. Ele faleceu em 1256, em sua cidade natal, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Knight Alexander Alured De Denne родился в 1185 г. в местности кингстон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Dene было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybell de Gatton, 23. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Arlene West. Он умер в 1256 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Knight Alexander Alured De Denne nació en 1185, en Kingston, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Dene, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Sybell de Gatton, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Arlene West. Murió en 1256, en su pueblo, a la edad de 71 años.
